_comment: MCP server config for the RCA pipeline. Replace placeholder env vars with real secrets in your environment - DO NOT commit real credentials. For enterprise deployments requiring VPC-only data, swap the remote/hosted servers below for their self-hosted equivalents (see MCP_Landscape_for_RCA.md).

atlassian._comment: Atlassian Remote MCP Server (Rovo). GA Feb 2026. Covers Jira + Confluence.
atlassian._pinned_version: n/a — remote HTTP server, version is server-controlled by Atlassian

azure-devops._comment: Microsoft's official ADO MCP. Use local stdio until remote MCP GA. See microsoft/azure-devops-mcp.
azure-devops._pinned_version: Pinned to ^1.0.0 (any 1.x). Operators MUST tighten this to a specific version (e.g. @1.2.3) before production.

datadog._comment: Datadog Remote MCP. GA March 10, 2026. Toolsets: APM, logs, metrics, incidents. Swap to self-host (e.g. winor30/mcp-server-datadog) if data must stay in VPC.
datadog._pinned_version: n/a — remote HTTP server, version is server-controlled by Datadog

dynatrace._comment: Dynatrace official MCP. Alternative to Datadog; exposes Davis AI + DQL over Grail.
dynatrace._pinned_version: Image tag pinned to v0.5.0. Operators MUST replace with their tested tag (or sha256 digest for full immutability) before production.

github._comment: GitHub official MCP. Remote OAuth for Claude Code still maturing; prefer local Docker + PAT for now.
github._pinned_version: Image tag pinned to v0.6.0. Operators MUST replace with their tested tag (or sha256 digest) before production.

pagerduty._comment: PagerDuty official MCP. Mar 27 2026 update added time-range filtering and assignee-on-create.
pagerduty._pinned_version: Pinned to ^1.0.0 (any 1.x). Operators MUST tighten this to a specific version before production.

_version_pinning_policy: Every stdio server MUST be pinned to a specific version (npm @x.y.z or docker :tag). Unpinned servers are caught by scripts/verify_mcp_config.py and refused in live-deploy CI (--require-env mode). Before promoting to production, operators must replace the semver ranges below with the exact version they tested against.
